attributes.description: Alerts when `go_goroutines > 10000` on the InfluxDB process. Indicates a goroutine leak that will eventually crash the server.
attributes.name: [InfluxDB OTel] Go goroutine leak suspected

investigation_guide.blob:
## InfluxDB goroutine leak suspected

### What fired
`go_goroutines` exceeded 10,000 during the window.

### Why it matters
Healthy InfluxDB instances run with hundreds to low thousands of goroutines. Counts above 10,000 indicate leaks — usually unclosed HTTP handlers, stuck queries, or misbehaving tasks.

### Triage
1. Sample pprof/goroutine profile from the admin endpoint.
2. Look at recent task execution failures.

### Remediation
- Restart the server to recover.
- Root-cause via profile and file an issue.

### Tuning
- 10,000 threshold; tune to your baseline.
